SEARCH
Package model.user

Class Teacher

java.lang.Object
model.user.User
model.user.Employee
model.user.Teacher
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<User>, Subscribable
public class Teacher extends Employee
Teacher role responsible for course materials, marks, complaints, attendance, and student information.

Professors are initialized as researchers automatically. Other teacher statuses can gain researcher capabilities by calling becomeResearcher().

See Also:

    • Teacher

      public Teacher()

    • Teacher

      public Teacher(String name, String surname, String birthDate, String phoneNumber, String email, String password, Status teacherStatus, String experience)
      Creates a teacher with the specified academic status.
      Parameters:
      name - first name
      surname - family name
      birthDate - date of birth
      phoneNumber - contact phone
      email - email address
      password - initial password
      teacherStatus - academic position
      experience - teaching experience description

    • sendComplaint

      public void sendComplaint(Student student, String reason, ComplaintUrgency urgency, Manager dean)
      Sends a complaint about a student to the dean/manager as an official message.
      Parameters:
      student - student being reported
      reason - complaint reason
      urgency - complaint urgency level
      dean - manager receiving the complaint

    • putMark

      public void putMark(String courseName, String studentId, Double firstAtt, Double secondAtt, Double finalGrade)
      Adds a mark for a student in a course.
      Parameters:
      courseName - course title
      studentId - student identifier
      firstAtt - first attestation score
      secondAtt - second attestation score
      finalGrade - final exam score

    • viewMarks

      public String viewMarks(String courseName)
      Returns all marks recorded for a course.
      Parameters:
      courseName - course title used for filtering
      Returns:
      formatted mark list

    • markAttendance

      public void markAttendance(String courseId, String studentId, boolean present, String note)
      Records attendance for a student in a course.
      Parameters:
      courseId - course identifier
      studentId - student identifier
      present - whether the student was present
      note - optional attendance note

    • viewAttendance

      public String viewAttendance(String courseId)
      Returns attendance records for a course.
